texts: Fixed Artwork and Voiceline Guessers crashing when hitting backspace while the search input is empty.
Persisted settings (on the local device) for the Artwork and Voiceline Guessers.
Removed already guessed items from the search input for the Artwork and Voiceline Guessers.
Removed event identities from previous seasons and event reward identities from the current season from the Extraction Simulator's standard pool since they can't be extracted normally.
Fixed announcers not being handled properly by the Extraction Simulator.

Added a Keyword Modifiers toggle in the Team Solver. Turning it on will allow it to consider keyword-changing effects such as equipping specific E.G.O. This currently does not support giving Dawn Sinclair Tremor when you have the new E.G.O gift.

Updated the Keyword Distribution display in Team Builds to consider Keyword Modifiers when equipping specific E.G.O. This currently does not support giving Dawn Sinclair Tremor when you have the new E.G.O gift.
